creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On Sat, 1 Jul 2000 fred@condo.chico.ca.us wrote:

> >How-To-Repeat:
> Build the 4.0-STABLE sshd; try to log in with Mac F-Secure SSH 1.0.1. 
> 

We can successfully connect using Mac F-Secure SSH 1.0.2 to 4.1-STABLE 
OpenSSH here using password auth.

FreeBSD chuck.rcinfo.net 4.1-STABLE FreeBSD 4.1-STABLE #0: Thu Jul 27
09:02:36 EDT 2000     root@chuck.rcinfo.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/CHUCK
i386
